wordplay_note: The literal meaning is the literal plot — God incarnate as a child
card_description: Emmanuel (meaning "Emmanuel = God is with us (Hebrew)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Divine Invasion*. Child who is the incarnation of Yah (God) smuggled to Earth past the demonic Belial. Name note: The literal meaning is the literal plot — God incarnate as a child. God returning to a world ruled by the demiurge — PKD's gnostic narrative made literal. First appears in *The Divine Invasion*.

reference.brief: Child who is the incarnation of Yah (God) smuggled to Earth past the demonic Belial
reference.significance: God returning to a world ruled by the demiurge — PKD's gnostic narrative made literal
